title: tetraneuris linearifolia var. linearifolia
intro: Tetraneuris linearifolia var. linearifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain four-leaf or narrow-leaf four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Tetraneuris linearifolia var. linearifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
